title: justicia neesii
intro: Justicia neesii, also known as Nilgiri Justicia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats region of India and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and skin conditions. The plant's leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, have been found to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for various health conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of Justicia neesii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in the form of tinctures and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
